title: Cinematic Title Card AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic title-card recipe built around NOCTURNE and rain-soaked alley, antique keys, detective silhouette, mansion windows, fog, and broken clock fragments integrated into the letters. Subject: dark mystery film identity shows the genre premise. NOCTURNE is the readable title or wordmark; material and embedded scenes must reinforce the genre. Scene: rain-soaked alley, antique keys, detective silhouette, mansion windows, fog, and broken clock fragments integrated into the letters supplies story imagery inside or around the title form. Composition: Center the title with strong cinematic hierarchy and controlled background texture. Signature Elements: Design a stunning 3D metallic title card for movie series name on a dark, textured background that captures the story's genre and mood for maximum cinematic impact. Each letter is individually sculpted as a cinematic form, with a distinct iconic scene from the film or series organically integrated into its shape through architectural elements, environments, characters, props, Style: Design a stunning 3D metallic title card for the chosen movie or series title on a dark, textured background that captures the story's genre and mood for maximum cinematic impact. defines the letter material and finish; keep reflections, wear, and atmosphere realistic. Color Palette: Design a stunning 3D metallic title card for the chosen movie or series title on a dark, textured background that captures the story's genre and mood for maximum cinematic impact. controls genre mood and background grade. Typography: OFFICIAL TITLE CARD shows the short subtitle. NOCTURNE must be legible title typography, not filler copy. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
